---
title: "Learning Math"
---

Interactive math notes with Desmos graphs and lecture videos.

## Lessons

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| Jan 13 | [Completing the Square & Parabolas](lessons/completing-the-square-parabolas.qmd) |
| Jan 20 | [Quadratic Equations & Graphing](lessons/quadratic-equations-graphing.qmd) |
| Jan 27 | [Rational Functions & Asymptotes](lessons/rational-functions-asymptotes.qmd) |
| Feb 03 | [Polynomial Graphing & Transformations](lessons/polynomial-graphing-transformations.qmd) |
| Feb 09 | [Power Functions & 3D Coordinates](lessons/power-functions-3d-coordinates.qmd) |
| Feb 10 | [Vectors & Parametric Equations](lessons/vectors-parametric-equations.qmd) |
| Feb 16 | [Triangle Area Ratios & Linear Combinations](lessons/triangle-area-ratios-linear-combinations.qmd) |
| Feb 18 | [Centroid & Median Lines](lessons/centroid-median-lines.qmd) |
| Feb 23 | [Trapezoid Midsegments & Signed Barycentric Coordinates](lessons/trapezoid-midsegments-signed-coordinates.qmd) |
| Feb 25 | [Similar Figures, Signed Areas & Exterior Barycentric Proof](lessons/similar-figures-signed-areas.qmd) |
